name: Empire Professional Services
description_short: Empire Professional Services is a credit repair provider based in Charlotte, North Carolina. Rated 4.8/5 with 31 Google reviews, reflecting exceptional customer satisfaction.
description_long:
Empire Professional Services is a credit repair provider serving clients in Charlotte, North Carolina. Carrying a 4.8/5.0 Google rating from 31 reviews, Empire Professional Services has an exceptional reputation among consumers in the Charlotte area looking to repair and improve their credit scores.

Empire Professional Services specializes in credit repair services designed to help consumers repair and improve their credit scores. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

When evaluating credit repair services in Charlotte, consumers should look for providers that dispute directly with all three credit bureaus — Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion. Key differentiators include transparency around pricing, realistic timelines for results, and whether the company offers a money-back guarantee. Empire Professional Services operates in a highly regulated industry under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), which requires written contracts, a three-day cancellation window, and prohibits upfront fees before services are rendered.

Consumers in the Charlotte, North Carolina area who are considering Empire Professional Services should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any credit repair provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
